title: What I think about the ultimate movie that needs to be made - True history of Atlantis

transcript.text: Hello. I just wanted to really quickly share this movie idea that I have. You know, and if it ends up not being made, I guess I'll have to write it and make it, but it'll probably be made by then.

It's kind of like Star Wars. I just watched all six of the Star Wars movies, and George Lucas really was super genius. I think it would go down in history in a thousand years on par with Einstein because of the Star Wars. His vision of Star Wars I think is better than Star Trek. I haven't really watched Star Trek, but with Star Trek they don't really tie all the civilizations together.

You know, it's like they're always out discovering some new civilization or whatever, but with Star Wars, it's like all the civilizations are together, and it's like this whole galactic federation with all these different aliens and stuff together and, you know, all the technology with floating cities and all this stuff that, like, when I look into the future, that's what I see.

Because, you know, because, you know, if you have anti-gravity with the flying sages we're seeing all over the place, obviously you can have anti-gravity with cities themselves just hanging there floating in the air.

And so, um, I think we should have a movie like that with that kind of technology, but having to do with the earth, um, I haven't really read any books, but, uh, you know, like, I know that there's, like, um, that the pyramids, uh, there's no way Stone Age cultures could build the pyramids.
There's actually no way even we could build the pyramids.
We tried to move a, uh, block as big as the big block in the pyramid, and we can only build, move a block that size for, like, five feet.
There are these special cranes that, that we, that we have that can do that, but they can't move the blocks as far as we need to move them to make the pyramids.
So we, we, we can't build pyramids.
So somebody else did.
So anyways, we need to have a movie about that.
So this is a movie I think.

How about a movie with a galactic federation, just like Star Wars, people are flying hither to thither, this planet to that planet, and we've got, like, uh, we've got, like, uh, even, uh, people on Mars, living on Mars.
Maybe that's another movie, though.

Like, there's a big island in the Caribbean.

But, um, or the left side, the right side is the Eczema's left side, and I can't remember, but anyway, so you have that as, uh, as, as Atlantis.
